examples.name: Bouncing Ball
examples.description: A simple ball that bounces up and down with easing — great for learning keyframe animation.

examples.name: Logo Reveal
examples.description: A two-element reveal: a circle scales in, then a title fades up — classic opener sequence.

examples.name: Color Pulse
examples.description: A background rectangle that pulses between two colors in a ping-pong loop.

examples.name: Motion Path
examples.description: A circle follows a curved SVG path across the canvas — demonstrates motionPath tracks.

examples.name: Progress Bar
examples.description: A gradient progress bar with glow effect that fills across the canvas, then swaps 'Loading…' for 'Complete!'.

examples.name: Staggered Text Reveal
examples.description: Three words — Think. Design. Ship. — fade and slide up in sequence with a stagger delay.

examples.name: Loading Spinner
examples.description: Three dots bounce up and down in a staggered ping-pong loop — a classic loading indicator.

examples.name: Gradient Sunrise
examples.description: A radial-gradient sun rises from below the horizon as the night-sky overlay fades out.
